body_txt: Time is money. Therefore, if you control time, you control money. The easiest and most popular way of using Time Travel for mercantile purposes is the Compound-Interest Time Travel Gambit , but there are a lot of other ways. Beware of Time Police , though. And note that the Butterfly of Doom and the Timeline-Altering MacGuffin both existed because of this trope. Most common in series with Casual Time Travel .
